hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams apply internal rules and thresholds to transaction screening alerts while linking wallet risk signals, cases, and audit evidence in one operational workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Transaction screening depends on manual rules
problem_description: Compliance teams often struggle to apply internal rules consistently across fragmented transaction alerts and wallet risk signals. This creates slow reviews, inconsistent risk thresholds and gaps in audit evidence for transaction screening workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates transaction screening alerts and wallet risk signals, enforcing consistent internal rules and routing cases with full audit evidence to streamline review workflows for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From transaction alerts to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects transaction screening alerts through internal rule application, case creation, risk review, decision logging and evidence preservation for clear compliance outcomes.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects transaction screening alerts with wallet, risk and case data to create structured reviews, recorded decisions and audit-ready evidence in one compliance layer.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing transaction risk by preserving audit evidence and orchestrating provider outputs within enterprise-grade compliance and governance frameworks.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how transaction screening rules manage risk alerts
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how internal rules apply to transaction screening alerts
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence is preserved during transaction alert reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect to compliance case workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for transaction screening teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk signals into structured workflows, enabling teams to monitor, review and manage transaction screening alerts against internal rules and regulatory requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY apply transaction screening rules?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies configured transaction risk thresholds, sanctions and policy rules to alerts, routing cases for review and escalation within a single compliance operating layer.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting provider outputs as audit-ready evidence to support regulatory reviews and internal compliance reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing KYC, KYT and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into one connected compliance workflow without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing transaction screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured transaction screening cases, decisions and evidence for more efficient compliance operations.
final_title: Apply transaction screening rules with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects transaction alerts, wallet risk, cases and audit evidence into structured compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
